name: Valvoline Inc.
description: Valvoline Inc. is a leading American retail automotive services company headquartered in Lexington, Kentucky. Recognized as a trusted name in preventive vehicle maintenance, the company specializes in providing convenient, high-quality services, including its signature 15-minute stay-in-your-car oil changes, battery replacements, and tire rotations. With a vast network of company-owned and franchised locations across North America, Valvoline focuses on automotive service innovations that simplify vehicle care for consumers. The company has a long-standing history of excellence, leveraging its brand to deliver reliable maintenance solutions that keep vehicles running efficiently and safely on the road.
